title: bee-planning core rewrite: D1 freeze, D3/D4 lane shapes, D5 ordering, D6/D7 mode gate, D8 intake-first (RED-first doctrine assertions)
action: RED-FIRST: extend scripts/test_gate_bypass_doctrine.mjs with a new lane-doctrine section asserting the NEW planning invariants: (a) the literal 'Enrich the **same**' is ABSENT from skills/bee-planning/SKILL.md; (b) freeze wording present (plan.md frozen at Gate 2, approval stamp only) per D1; (c) intake-classification-before-bootstrap wording present per D8; (d) tiny 'request + cell' no-plan.md wording present per D3; (e) small 'scoping synthesis' + plan.md opt-in wording present per D4; (f) preview-then-merged-gate ordering wording present per D5. Run the test, RECORD the failing output to docs/history/lane-ceremony-v3/reports/lcv3-1-red.txt. THEN rewrite skills/bee-planning/SKILL.md exactly per CONTEXT D1/D3/D4/D5/D6/D7/D8: invert Bootstrap vs Mode Gate (cheap intake classification first: request + max 2 targeted reads; lane-scaled additional bootstrap; critical-patterns digest stays mandatory EVERY lane via session preamble, with the explicit supersession note from D8); mode-gate section gets product-files-only cap definition (D6, verbatim exclusions: .bee/**, docs/**, plans/briefs/reports, generated projections/manifests) and the two narrowed flags (D7 exact wordings from CONTEXT); rebuild Shape/Prep: standard/high-risk write plan.md requirements-only, Gate 2 FREEZES it (approval stamp only — no in-place enrichment, artifact_readiness mutation removed), prep creates current-slice cells only (D2); tiny/small path: targeted reads, draft cell(s) rendered as preview in the gate message (never persisted first), inline reality check, merged shape+execution question (bypass branch unchanged in mechanics: reality check still runs, only the question is skipped), cells persisted+claimed AFTER approval (D5); tiny = request + one cell, mode-gate record (flags+product-file count+lane) in the cell action/notes (D3); small = scoping synthesis logged via decisions CLI with D-IDs + 1-3 cells, plan.md opt-in (D4). Update headless section + Red Flags list to match. Update references/planning-reference.md: remove 'implementation-ready additions' marker + in-place enrichment comment from the plan template (freeze contract instead), update trace-of-shapes line to 'mode -> shape (plan.md, frozen at Gate 2) -> cells', update fan-out table rows (tiny: no plan.md; small: opt-in), update shape-bodies-by-mode line, keep cell-quality rule 7 'Current slice only'. Re-run the doctrine test to GREEN. CLOSE-OUT (same cell, per critical-patterns :514-530 — the release manifest hashes the canonical skills/ tree, so a skill edit without manifest regen leaves the shared verify baseline red for every session): after the doctrine test is GREEN, run node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs (must exit 0; a marker refusal means your edit broke a render marker — fix it, never bypass) then node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write, and include the rendered plugin trees + manifest in this cell's single commit.

never weaken a gate, evidence rule, or the AO14 worker contract
do not renumber or reword CONTEXT D-IDs

RED-first: 7 new assertions failed against old text (recorded lcv3-1-red.txt), GREEN after rewrite. Plugin trees re-rendered (105 files each) + release manifest regenerated (362 files) in-cell.
